data.title: GREEN: Add flaky scoring dimension to SKILL.md rubric
data.description:
Add intermittent/flaky row to scoring rubric table in plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md:
- 0 = deterministic across 3 consecutive runs
- 1 = suspected non-determinism (CI intermittent, env-specific, <100% reproduction)
- 2 = directly observed failure-then-pass on identical runs
Add note that dimension is additive to total; tier thresholds unchanged.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Task ec58-533d tests pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-fix-bug-flaky-scoring.sh
- [ ] SKILL.md contains intermittent in rubric
  Verify: grep -q 'intermittent' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md contains additive contribution note
  Verify: grep -q 'additive' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md
